title: digitaria ciliata subsp. pubiflora
intro: Digitaria ciliata subsp. pubiflora, also known as the hairy panic grass, is a subspecies of grass in the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to be effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Digitaria ciliata subsp. pubiflora include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antifungal and antibacterial activities. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea or tincture, and it can also be dried and made into a powder for use in capsules or other formulations.
